parties: Pearson Specter Litt LLP [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1]
jurisdiction: State of New York [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1]
summary: An employment agreement established between Pearson Specter Litt LLP and Harvey Reginald Specter, outlining compensation via an annual retainer, confidentiality requirements, and the governing legal framework.
key_facts: The employee is to receive a total annual retainer of $850,000 [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1].
The employee is obligated to maintain strict client confidentiality for a period of 5 years following the termination of the contract [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1].
The agreement is subject to the laws of the State of New York [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1].
Any disputes arising from the terms of this agreement must be resolved through binding arbitration [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1].
timeline: • March 15, 2024: The employment contract is entered into by the parties [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1].
• 5 years post-termination: The expiration of the employee's confidentiality obligation [SOURCE: employment_contract_scan.pdf, Page 1].
